name: Low Cal Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together gelatin, 6 tablespoons sugar, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Beat together egg yolks and milk; add to gelatin mixture.
3. Place over boiling water and cook, stirring constantly until gelatin is dissolved and mixture thickens slightly (approximately 6 minutes). Remove from heat and stir in lemon rind.
4. Chill until mixture reaches unbeaten egg white consistency.
5. While the mixture is chilling, beat cottage cheese on high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes, or press through a sieve, or use a food processor.
6. Stir in lemon juice and vanilla.
7. Fold gently into gelatine mixture.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff, but not dry.
9. Gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar, and beat until very stiff.
10. Fold gently into the gelatin mixture.
11. Turn into an 8-inch springform pan and sprinkle top with crumbs.
12. Chill until firm. Makes 10-12 servings of approximately 125 calories per serving.
